'''''Eel''''' was a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. ''Eel'' and ''[[Asp]]'' were to go up against [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|MC40a light cruisers]] [[Ta (MC40a light cruiser)|''Ta'']] and ''[[Re]]''. Both ships had [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]] from [[Avenger Squadron]] and [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] from [[Talon Squadron (Galactic Empire)|Talon Squadron]].

==Behind the scenes==
The outcome depends on which side the player takes.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
